description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image and defines a single build stage. Set a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project root and makes gradlew executable. Add a build job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug test. Configure a cache keyed by the project ID that stores the .gradle/ directory. No additional services, artifacts, or rules are required.
